message:
Unsanitized archive entry, which may contain '..', is used in a [file system operation](1).
Unsanitized archive entry, which may contain '..', is used in a [file system operation](2).
Untrusted URL redirection depends on a [user-provided value](1).
This [regular expression](1) that depends on a [user-provided value](2) may run slow on strings starting with '<title>' and with many repetitions of '<title>a'.

This [regular expression](1) that depends on a [user-provided value](2) may run slow on strings starting with '<meta name="description" content="' and with many repetitions of '<meta name="description" content="a'.
